text: This paper tries to reveal extent of dikili's activity to carry out the activity that is a part of the terminological custom tradition/Gorontalo culture by assessing it through socio cultural approach by doing empirik literature study and also by observing its performance in some occasion of custom of dikili. The result of the study showed that in fact in social and tribal culture of Gorontalo society, dikili is an object that is considered important and having religious character that functions to regulate or control human behavior in the social life. Artistic values or aesthetic norms which consist of modikili are translated into beliefs and understandings of the existence of Allah the Most High where the formula of worship is expressed in a deep mirrour called recitation. As the base reference of the dominant Islamic teaching of Gorontalo's Islamic community, artistry function as modikili is carried out by dikili. Thus, this fact is a causative factor of Gorontalo society's high esteem towards traditions in general and especially Islamic traditions which are always preserved and maintained along with the culture of Gorontalo that is the motto or slogan of Gorontalo culture which is reflected in Islam, that is "adati hula hula’a. to sara’a., sara’a. hula hula’a. to kuru'ani " or customary on the basis of al Quran (Kitab Allah).
